name: Mrs. f Peanut Butter Kisses
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F. Place rack in the top third position.
2. Sift together flour, baking soda, and salt onto a sheet of wax paper.
3. In a large bowl, beat butter and peanut butter with a mixer until creamy.
4. Gradually add granulated sugar and all brown sugar, beating until light and smooth.
5. Beat in egg, milk, and vanilla extract.
6. Stir flour mixture into the batter using a wooden spoon.
7. Form dough into balls, about 1-inch diameter.
8. Roll each ball in granulated sugar.
9. Place cookies on ungreased baking sheets, spacing them about 1-1/2 inches apart.
10. Bake one sheet at a time for 8 minutes until edges are set.
11. Remove from oven and place a chocolate kiss in the center of each cookie.
12. Return to oven and continue baking for an additional 2 minutes or until lightly browned.
13. Allow cookies to cool on sheets for 5 minutes before transferring to wire racks to cool completely.
